wins: Revenue grew 14% sequentially and 36% year-over-year in Q4
U.S. commercial revenue grew 64% year-over-year and 20% sequentially
U.S. government business revenue grew 45% year-over-year
Fourth quarter TCV book was $1.79 billion, up 56% year-over-year
risks: Revenue from strategic commercial contracts is expected to decline in Q1 2025
Anticipated increase in expenses in 2025 due to technical hires and AI production use cases
Uncertainty around the Rule of 40 score and potential need for a new rule
